supported_devices: Digital HID fixtures (Phantom, Core), analog LED fixtures (PHOTOBIO); up to 512 digital or 100 analog LED
port_types: 2x locking mini 3P IP65 zone connectors, 2x 20ft 3P M-RJ 6P shielded data cable (Phantom HID), 2x 20ft 3P M-2P M shielded data cable (PHOTOBIO LED), 2x temperature probe connectors
compatible_lights: Phantom HID fixtures, Core HID fixtures, PHOTOBIO LED fixtures
supported_manufacturer_series: Phantom HID, Core HID, PHOTOBIO LED
recommended_use_note: Commercial/large-scale operation; controls up to 512 digital HID or 100 analog LED fixtures across two independent zones; temperature-based auto-dimming and emergency shutdown per zone; 100-240V input (globally compatible power adapter); for use with controllable Phantom/Core HID and PHOTOBIO LED fixtures only; 3-year warranty
uvp_notes: Retailer pricing; GrowersHouse $424.43; HydroBuilder $411.77; GrowWiser $375.00 (sale); no EUR pricing found
notes: Amazon.com ASIN: B08CVRZ64T; 100-240V 50/60Hz power adapter (5ft) included; each zone independently configurable for digital or analog LED; sunrise/sunset ramp simulation; configurable restrike delays; built-in battery backup; RF-shielded locking connectors; two 50ft temperature probes (one per zone) included; available through Hydrofarm Europe; dimensions converted from 6.42in W × 5.00in H × 13.07in D; weight 3.75 lbs
